messages.body: Hi. We need a large quantity of KNM Coffee but we want it in three separate deliveries to different locations.
We can do multiple shipments of the same product. How many bags in total and how do you want to split?
30 bags total. We have three sites — main office, warehouse, and the new branch.
Quantities and addresses for each?
12 bags to 100 Finance Ave, 10 bags to 200 Warehouse Lane, 8 bags to 15 New Branch Rd.
Delivery dates?
We'd like Finance Ave Feb 28, Warehouse march 4, New Branch march 10. Can we get a volume discount?
For 30 bags we can do 6% — $23.50 per bag, total $705.
What about 8%? We might have repeat orders every quarter across these sites.
I can do 7% for 30 bags — $22.75 per bag, total $682.50. 8% I'd need to confirm with pricing.
Let's lock 7%. PO-2025-11-280. Payment Net 30 from last delivery.
Noted. 12 bags Feb 28 Finance Ave, 10 bags march 4 Warehouse Lane, 8 bags march 10 New Branch Rd. Payment due april 8.
Correct. We might need to move the New Branch delivery to march 12 — they're still setting up receiving. Can we keep that flexible?
I'll put march 10 for now. If you need to shift to march 12, give us at least 48 hours notice.
Also — can we add 2 extra bags to the Finance Ave shipment? So 14 bags Feb 28, 10 Warehouse, 8 New Branch. Total 32.
Yes. 32 bags at $22.75 = $728. I'll update the orders. Same 7% applies.
Invoice to accounts@company.com. Cost centre CC-301 for this order — please put on SO and all DOs.
Will do. FOB Singapore, our delivery to all three addresses. Correct?
Yes. Last time we had an issue with one shipment — the delivery note had the wrong quantity. Can you double-check each DO?
We've tightened our checks. Each DO will show the correct quantity and address. You'll get the note on the day of each delivery.
We might add a fourth site in Q1. Would the 7% hold if we do another 30 bags then?
We'd look at cumulative volume. If you're doing 30+ every quarter we can discuss a standing discount. We can revisit when you have Q1 numbers.
Do you have KNM Decaf? We might want a few bags for the staff room at Finance Ave — could we add 2 bags to that shipment?
We have KNM Decaf at $26 per bag. So shipment 1 would be 14 regular + 2 decaf, total 16 bags. Decaf doesn't get the 7% — it would be 2 x $26 = $52 on top.
Skip the decaf for now. Keep it 14 + 10 + 8 = 32 bags as we said.
Understood. 32 bags KNM Coffee only, three shipments as per above.
If we need to reschedule any of the three dates, how much notice?
At least 48 hours so we can adjust routes. The more notice the better.
Origin — can you put coffee origin on the packing list for each shipment? Quality wants to track it.
Yes. Same origin for all — we'll include it on each packing list.
That's all. Thanks for your patience with the back and forth.
No problem. SO will be with you by end of day. Good day.
